> [!note] Pre-Meeting Context
> Alice is the engineering lead. Bob manages the backend team.
> They previously discussed migrating to the new API in January.
>

> [!summary] Meeting Summary
> The team agreed to prioritize the API migration for Q1. Alice will lead
> the effort with Bob's backend team handling the data layer. Charlie will
> coordinate with the frontend team on the new endpoints.
>
> Key decisions:
> - API migration starts March 20
> - Backend team gets 2 additional engineers
> - Frontend integration begins April 1
>

## Action Items

- [ ] **[Alice]** -- Draft API migration plan by March 18
- [ ] **[Bob]** -- Set up staging environment for new API
- [x] **[Charlie]** -- Send meeting invite for frontend sync
- [ ] Review budget allocation for Q2

> [!abstract]- Full Transcript
> [00:00] Alice: Let's start with the Q1 priorities.
> [00:15] Bob: I think the API migration should be top priority.
> [01:30] Charlie: Agreed. The frontend team is ready to integrate.
>
